programs.title: JAG
programs.desc: Harm learns that after being shot down during the Vietnam War his father was taken to Russia, so he and Mac go on a desperate search for him and end up in Moscow, where they get into a dispute with the local government.

programs.title: JAG
programs.desc: The JAG team led by Commander Harm Rabb investigate another military case. Harm's search for his father continues in Russia, where he eventually discovers his father's fate.

programs.title: Bull
programs.desc: Bull assists in the murder trial defence of an old friend - a professional gambler accused of killing her wealthy father to cash in on inheritance.

programs.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programs.desc: A case that's too open and shut nags at everyone on the team, leading each of them to ruin their evening by revisiting different aspects of the crime.

programs.title: Law & Order: SVU
programs.desc: The hunt for a murder suspect uncovers a crime with shocking legal and ethical implications. Bruno must protect his squad during a raid on a suspect's home. Carisi and Price team up in court.

programs.title: Blue Bloods
programs.desc: Frank grapples with the personal loss of his best friend and how best to help Tess Ross, the daughter of his best friend, when she lands in jail; Jaime and his nephew, Joe Hill, race against the clock to reunite a trafficking victim with her sister.
